_comment: Kafka/Confluent MCP — topic management, consumer group inspection, schema registry. Enable only when project uses Kafka.
_install: claude mcp add kafka -s user -e CONFLUENT_CLOUD_API_KEY -e CONFLUENT_CLOUD_API_SECRET -- npx -y @confluentinc/mcp-confluent
_security: Use dev/staging Confluent credentials only. Never use production API keys. Topic creation/deletion modifies cluster state.
